message.content:
@startuml
participant "IntegrationTest" as IT
participant "Spring\nApplication" as SA
participant "De /nSerializer" as DS
participant "info:AddMember\nRequestInfoDTO" as INFO
participant "ctrl:AddMember\nToGroupController" as CTRL
participant "AddMember\nRequestAssembler" as ARA
participant "requestDTO:\nAddMemberRequestDTO" as RDTO
participant "AddMemberResponse\nDTOAssembler" as ARDA
participant "groupRespDTO:\nGroupResponseDTO" as GRDTO
participant "srv:AddMember\nToGroupService" as SRV

note over SRV : Continues through\nnext Diagram

IT -> SA : POST\n**1** /groups/"Family"/\nmembers/"ana@gmail.com"
SA -> DS : **1.1** deserialize("groupDesc":"Family",\n"personEmail":"ana@gmail.com")
DS -> INFO : **1.1.1** create (groupDesc,\nPersonEmail)
SA -> CTRL : **1.2** addMember(info)
CTRL -> ARA : addMemberMapToDTO\n**1.2.1** (info.getGroupDescription(),\ninfo.getPersonEmail())
ARA -> RDTO : **1.2.1.1** create
CTRL -> SRV : **1.2.2** addMemeber(requestDTO)
SRV --> CTRL : **1.2.3** groupDTO
CTRL -> ARDA : **1.2.4** mapToGroupResponseDTO(GroupDTO)
ARDA -> GRDTO : **1.2.4.1** create
ARDA --> CTRL : **1.2.5** groupRespDTO
CTRL --> SA : **1.2.6** ResponseEntity(groupRespDTO,\nHttpStatus.OK)
SA -> DS : **1.3** serialize(ResponseEntity(groupRespDTO,\nHttpStatus.OK))
DS --> SA : **1.4** HttpResponse
SA --> IT : **1.5** HttpResponse
@enduml
